mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class (name, description, class_code, teacher_id, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{classCode}, #{teacherId}, NOW(), NOW(), #{isDeleted})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, class_code as classCode, teacher_id as teacherId, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, is_deleted as isDeleted FROM class WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, name, description, class_code as classCode, teacher_id as teacherId, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, is_deleted as isDeleted FROM class WHERE class_code = #{classCode} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, name, description, class_code as classCode, teacher_id as teacherId, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, is_deleted as isDeleted FROM class WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, name, description, class_code as classCode, teacher_id as teacherId, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, is_deleted as isDeleted FROM class WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
